creator: cmangin@arobas.net
text:
Current version 0.8.2 has been marked as IGNORE because it does not work correctly with HAL.
AFAIK version 1.0.10 does not use HAL. I have been using a patched version of 1.0.10 on my laptop for the last few days.
I'm submitting the patch here.
Note: The patch was also submitted upstream but the author hasn't responded yet. https://bugzilla.xfce.org/show_bug.cgi?id=7675
